operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Hamas Rejects Gaza Disarmament at Board of Peace Cairo Talks; 765 Palestinians Killed Since October Ceasefire
heroSubtitle: Aid at only 37% of required levels as OCHA warns famine conditions persist; 72,315+ killed since Oct 7, 2023; world attention shifting to Iran-US nuclear talks leaves Gaza 'forgotten'
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,315+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / UN OCHA, Apr 8 2026). 765 killed since Oct 10, 2025 ceasefire framework (OCHA Apr 17, 2026). 2,400+ ceasefire violations documented by Gaza GMO. ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803; Hamas rejecting disarmament proposal (Apr 2026). Kosovo approved troop contribution to Gaza Stabilization Force (Apr 17). ICJ Advisory Opinion (Oct 22, 2025): Israel must allow UNRWA to operate — Israel refuses to comply. OCHA Apr 17 report: aid at 37% of required levels; ~102–122 trucks/day vs. 600+ needed; Zikim Crossing reopened Apr 12 on alternating days. Lancet Mortality Survey: 75,200 violent deaths through Jan 5, 2025. UNRWA SitRep #217 (Apr 8–14): 571,000 in emergency hunger, 18,000 await medical evacuation. 2026 Flash Appeal $4.1B req, only 9.7% funded.
